# Qubit of Hope — Volume I

Public multilingual reading repository for Volume I by Ivan Kotov.

Rights posture:
- All Rights Reserved
- public reading in repository is allowed
- local personal download is allowed
- redistribution, mirror upload, translation, derivative works, audiobook production, and commercial reuse require prior written permission
- authoritative files: RIGHTS.json / LICENSE.txt / NOTICE.txt

Start here:
- README.md
- DOWNLOADS.md
- RELEASE_STATUS.md
- metadata/HUMAN_ENTRY.md
- MACHINE_ENTRY.md

Next volume URL: https://github.com/Kot141078/qubit-of-hope-volume-ii

Machine-readable files:
- REPO_INDEX.json
- BOOK_METADATA.json
- EDITIONS_MATRIX.json
- RIGHTS.json
- MANIFEST.json
- metadata/ASSET_MAP.json
- metadata/RELEASE_STATUS.json

Integrity files:
- hashes/SHA256SUMS.source-tree.txt
- hashes/SHA256SUMS.repo-layout.txt
- hashes/SHA256SUMS.repo-all.txt
- hashes/SHA256SUMS.metadata-only.txt

Language status:
- aligned: fr, de, nl
- provisional: ru, es, en, zh-CN

Important note:
Imported asset filenames are preserved as imported from the source tree.
Provisional bundles are documented transparently and are not silently normalized.
